about: Volt Electric was started in 2008 by Michael Reeves, a master electrician with over 25 years of experience. After working for large commercial firms, Michael set out to build a company where every job — no matter how small — gets the same attention to safety and code compliance.
ownerBio: Michael holds a Master Electrician license in the state of Texas, NFPA certifications, and is a Generac authorized service dealer. He personally oversees every project and ensures it meets the highest standards of safety and craftsmanship.
tagline: Licensed master electricians providing safe, code-compliant electrical services for homes and businesses.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.shortDesc: 100 to 200 amp upgrades for modern power demands
services.desc: Older homes often have 60 or 100 amp panels that can't keep up with modern appliances, EV chargers, and HVAC systems. We upgrade to 200 amp service safely and to code.
details: Add sub-panels for workshops or additions

services.title: Wiring & Rewiring
services.shortDesc: New construction and old home rewiring
services.desc: Aluminum wiring, knob-and-tube, and degraded insulation are fire hazards. We bring your home's wiring up to current NEC standards.

services.title: Lighting Installation
services.desc: From recessed can lights to landscape lighting, we design and install lighting that transforms your space.

services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.desc: Level 2 home charging is the most cost-effective way to charge. We install all major brands with proper permits.

services.title: Generator Installation
services.desc: Whole-house standby generators provide automatic backup power during outages. We're authorized dealers for Generac and Kohler.

services.title: Smart Home Wiring
services.desc: Future-proof your home with structured wiring for smart switches, hubs, and whole-home automation systems.

services.title: Commercial Electrical
services.desc: Tenant improvements, code compliance upgrades, and preventive maintenance for commercial properties.

services.title: Emergency Service
services.desc: Electrical emergencies don't wait — neither do we. 24/7 availability with rapid response times.

reviews.name: Margaret T.
reviews.text: They upgraded our 60-year-old panel and rewired the kitchen. Everything passed inspection the first time. True professionals who care about safety.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Called them for an emergency at 11 PM — a sparking outlet. They were here in 30 minutes. Can't recommend enough for their response time.

reviews.name: Rachel & Tom S.
reviews.text: Had our EV charger installed in the garage. They handled the permit, the install, and the inspection. Seamless from start to finish.

projects.title: 200A Panel Upgrade — Mueller Neighborhood
projects.scope: Replaced aging 100A Federal Pacific panel with 200A Square D. Added whole-home surge protection.

projects.title: Tesla Wall Connector — South Lamar Townhome
projects.scope: Installed dedicated 60A circuit and Tesla Wall Connector. Coordinated with HOA for exterior routing.

projects.title: LED Retrofit — Downtown Office Complex
projects.scope: Replaced 200+ fluorescent fixtures with LED panels. Reduced energy consumption by 62%.

projects.title: Whole-House Generac — Lakeway Estate
projects.scope: Installed Generac 22kW standby generator with 200A transfer switch. Natural gas connection.

projects.title: Smart Lighting — Modern Farmhouse Build
projects.scope: Designed and installed 47 recessed lights, Lutron Caseta smart switches, and landscape lighting.

projects.title: Tenant Improvement — East 6th Restaurant
projects.scope: Full electrical buildout including commercial kitchen circuits, POS wiring, and decorative lighting.
